functions.name: useGridPreview
MissionCommandPanel

  droneConnected,
  missionStatus = null,
  activeFlightId = null,
  title = "Command Panel",
  defaultExpanded = true,
  sx,
  apiBase,
  getTokenFn,
}

functions.name: MissionPreflightPanel
params:
{
  missionType = "route",
  preflightRun,
  telemetry,
  title = "Preflight",
  defaultExpanded = true,
  sx,
  apiBase,
  onRunPreflight,
  preflightBusy = false,
  runDisabled = false,
  runDisabledReason,
  runHint,
  droneConnected,
}

functions.name: MissionVideoPanel
params:
{
  title,
  imgAlt,
  disconnectedMessage,
  apiBase,
  streamKey,
  videoToken,
  startingVideo,
  videoError,
  videoRetryCount,
  droneConnected,
  telemetry,
  missionLabel,
  recordingStatus,
  onVideoError,
  onVideoLoad,
  onRetry,
  frameHeight = 240,
  frameSx,
  embedded = false,
  autoEnableDetection = false,
}

functions.name: TelemetryHud
params:
{
  telemetry,
  cameraTitle = "Survey Camera",
  missionLabel,
  recordingStatus,
  detection,
  sx,
}

callGraph.callee:
[
    { text: cameraTitle, emphasis: true },
    missionLabel ? { text: missionLabel } : null,
    recordingStatus ? { text: recordingStatus, dim: true } : null,
  ].filter

[
    modelShort,
    detection?.fps != null ? `${detection.fps} FPS` : null,
    detection?.enabled ? "ON" : detection ? "OFF" : null,
  ].filter

functions.name: CommandControlsSection
params:
{

  lifecycle,
  capabilities,
  busyCommand,
  message,
  error,
  onIssueCommand,
}
